title: acmispon distichus
intro: Acmispon distichus, also known as the spreading lupine, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure due to its high content of alkaloids like lupanine and sparteine. The health benefits of Acmispon distichus include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas and infusions, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and promote relaxation.
